title: Policies
text:
Kubernetes policies are configurations that manage other configurations or runtime behaviors. Kubernetes offers various forms of policies, described below:

Some API objects act as policies. Here are some examples:
NetworkPolicies
can be used to restrict ingress and egress traffic for a workload.
LimitRanges
manage resource allocation constraints across different object kinds.
ResourceQuotas
limit resource consumption for a
namespace
.
